digest.greeting: Jean, today produced concrete movement on the client travel-warning SMS path, while the remaining work is mostly about keeping portfolio, intake, PM structure, and Amazon Connect follow-ups tied to owners and dates. Tomorrow has several useful checkpoints, so the carry-forward list is best kept tight and action-oriented.

items.label: Submitted the Bulk SMS campaign request
items.detail: Jean sent the update that the SMS campaign ticket was submitted through Halo and aligned with Deepak as a high-priority request; the help desk confirmation logged ticket 0031317.

items.label: Give the Incident Response team edit access for runbooks
items.detail: Dan Mackey's access issue still needs a clean permission fix or confirmation before tomorrow's BCP/Incident Response touchpoint.

items.label: Route the active intake alerts into one ownership lane
items.detail: Keep the Phase 2, BD, Phase 1, and Court Call Intake Sheet items from splitting across separate paths; assign the right owner or portfolio follow-up before they drift.

items.label: Confirm the Legal Change Management follow-up path
items.detail: Capture the decision points, delegated follow-up, or next meeting need from today's IT/EPMO sync so the Legal Change Management path stays clear.

items.label: Turn the PM team index, Planner, weekly deck, and open-thread follow-ups into one operating structure
items.detail: Keep the Loop index, Planner updates, weekly executive deck, and PM discussion outputs moving through one rhythm with named owners and dates.

items.label: Align BD portfolio review with Janet's transition touchpoint
items.detail: Keep the BD review, active work, risks, new intake, owner decisions, and transition next steps connected as one operating lane.

items.label: Prepare the AmazonConnect/Venn OCM risk view
items.detail: Before tomorrow's noon discussion, keep timeline, stakeholder alignment, blockers, OCM risks, mitigation asks, usage costs, quota monitoring, and dashboard questions together.

items.label: Confirm SMS Automation BA support and engagement level
items.detail: Use tomorrow's SMS status meeting to clarify Ernestina's expected BA/SME support, timing, and engagement level.

items.label: Check the Mental Health Expansion charter deliverable
items.detail: Confirm whether the draft charter is ready for stakeholder review or needs an owner/date reset.

items.label: Start LA AI change-management testing
items.detail: Give the LA AI testing item a clean first pass and decide what evidence or feedback is needed before it becomes another open change-management thread.

items.label: Amazon Connect weekly updates will lead with on-track and at-risk status
items.detail: Thiago confirmed he will add a clear status section at the top of weekly updates showing whether committed dates and major milestones are on track or at risk.

items.label: Sara remains in the Dublin office
items.detail: Sara's office hold continues through Thursday, July 16.

items.label: AmazonConnect + Venn Tunneling - Timeline & OCM
items.detail: High-priority deep dive with Sara and Danny's framing around status, stakeholders, risks, blockers, and mitigation.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Use today's folder-permission issue to make sure runbooks and guidebook work are not blocked before the weekly touchpoint.

items.label: June & July Firmwide Meeting
items.detail: Firmwide meeting sits in the middle of the afternoon; protect prep and follow-through time around it.

items.label: SMS Automation Optimization Weekly Project Status
items.detail: Tomorrow's status meeting is the natural deadline for clarifying BA/SME support and expected engagement.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team coordination forum for progress, roadblocks, and strategic project momentum.
